---
title: "Training Programs"
---


> **Work in Progress**  
> This page highlights potential training opportunities for UC Police Department (UCPD) UAS programs. Content is preliminary and intended to support discussion and prioritization.

## Training Topics Under Discussion

- **FAA regulatory training**
  - Part 107 knowledge refreshers
  - Public aircraft vs civil operations
  - Waivers and special authorizations

- **Initial and recurrent flight training**
  - Pilot onboarding and qualification
  - Proficiency and currency expectations
  - Emergency and abnormal procedures

- **Public safety mission training**
  - Search and rescue support
  - Situational awareness and overwatch
  - Large events and perimeter operations

- **Advanced operations**
  - Night operations
  - Operations over people (where applicable)
  - Multi‑agency coordination

- **Program management and governance**
  - SOP development and maintenance
  - Documentation and recordkeeping
  - Equipment standardization considerations

- **Workshops and shared exercises**
  - Scenario‑based training
  - Tabletop exercises
  - Systemwide or regional workshops

This list is not exhaustive and will evolve as priorities are refined.
